name: [YAOC2] Capability Guard — Communications
_doc: Pre-flight guard for all outbound communications and LLM capabilities. Checks that required env vars exist for the requested capability (telegram, whatsapp, deepseek, slack, openai-compat). Returns {status:'ok'} if all checks pass, or {status:'missing', missingFields:[], instructions:'', onboarding_workflow:''} if anything is absent. The onboarding_workflow field names the Execute Workflow to trigger for interactive operator-guided setup. Called via Execute Workflow before any send node or LLM call in the policy gateway.
